mapper.select: select username, password, full_name as fullName, email from users where username = #{username}

select r.role_name from roles r
join user_roles ur on r.role_id = ur.role_id where ur.username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, full_name, email) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{fullName}, #{email})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
